features.evidence: It's easy enough to learn not to touch the power button, and I admit that glossy OLED screen in the right light is stunning, so.. Beautiful screen, excellent keyboard, amazing battery life, and able to do light gaming much better than expected.

I already have a gaming system, so I wanted a nice, light, portable, versatile laptop with great battery life. the order was incomplete and the product key provided by Amazon to upgrade Windows 11 Home to Pro, provided by Amazon was rejected by Microsoft.

I already have a gaming system, so I wanted a nice, light, portable, versatile laptop with great battery life. Beautiful screen, excellent keyboard, amazing battery life, and able to do light gaming much better than expected.

If it fits your needs as it does mine, and you can justify the price, I highly recommend it. That old yoga still works, and if this one lasts as long, then the price will become irevelent and this will be my daily driver whenever I'm not at my desk for the foreseeable future.
Its design and build quality are impressive.
Beautiful screen, excellent keyboard, amazing battery life, and able to do light gaming much better than expected.
The OLED display is razor sharp, simply magnificent, the facial and fingerprint recognition are welcome additions, the speed is fantastic, the list goes on and on.
This one has the 5.4 Bluetooth which is supposed to be LE compliant,
